top_signals.title: Comcast’s NBC Spinoff Sets Stage for More Media, Broadband Deals
top_signals.summary:
Comcast announced on Monday that it will spin off NBCUniversal and its European media unit, Sky, into a separate, independently traded company. Comcast will hang onto its cable-TV, broadband and wireless businesses. 
Chris Marangi, Co-CIO: Value at Gabelli Funds, and Bloomberg 'Wall Street Week' host David Westin discuss the broader media landscape and how this spinoff fits into the recent consolidation trend we've seen in the space. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: South Africa Court Drops Credit Suisse From Rand-Fixing Suit
top_signals.summary: South Africa’s Constitutional Court dismissed Credit Suisse Group AG from a suit alleging that the Swiss bank and others had manipulated the rand-dollar exchange rate for six years through at least September 2013.

top_signals.title: US Supreme Court rejects Trump’s bid to end birthright citizenship
top_signals.summary: Ruling is major blow to president’s immigration agenda

top_signals.title: New Zcash nonprofit Sovright unveils ZEC wallet recovery tool
top_signals.summary: Argos is a recovery tool for users who had shielded funds stuck on ZEC Wallet Lite, an issue impacting some longtime Zcash supporters.
